---
title: "05 Neighborhood Communication"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source("01_main_setup.R")
module <- "05_neighborhood_communication"
```

```{r}
edges <- read_optional_tsv(file.path(result_dir, "12_neighborhood_communication", "tables", "spatial_contact_edges.tsv"))
if (nrow(edges) > 0) {
  write_review_table(edges, module, "spatial_contact_edges_review.csv")
  top_edges <- edges |>
    arrange(desc(n_neighbor_edges)) |>
    slice_head(n = 30) |>
    mutate(pair = paste(source, target, sep = " -> "))
  p <- top_edges |>
    ggplot(aes(reorder(pair, n_neighbor_edges), n_neighbor_edges)) +
    geom_col(fill = "#A1C9F4") +
    coord_flip() +
    theme_spatial() +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Neighbor edges")
  save_plot_versions(p, module, "top_spatial_contact_edges", width = 8, height = 7)
  p
}
```
